director_instructions: The System Initialization milestone is DONE. The AutonomicLoopBanner is now mounted in src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx so the Director → Agent-Tasks → Worker pipeline is verified on every dashboard render. Next: verify the loop endpoints (/api/director/plan, /api/agents, /api/memory, /api/agent-tasks) return 2xx, fix any 4xx/5xx, and make sure the banner reflects live state on the dashboard, agent, and studio routes.

previous_milestone.name: System Initialization
completed_changes: Replaced src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx passthrough with a real layout that mounts <AutonomicLoopBanner /> above the dashboard surface.
Confirmed AutonomicLoopBanner was previously exported but never imported anywhere in the codebase (search across src/ returned zero callers).
Default theme is volcanic + sunset-orange (per ThemeContext.defaultTheme), so the banner picks up the volcanic cyber palette automatically.
